{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Urg'naut's tomb
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Contact has been lost with units around [[Urg'naut's tomb]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We’ve lost contact with our units around Urg’naut’s tomb,” Darius went on.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
